name: exam-paper-system
description: Exam paper generation system for CIE / Edexcel A-Level / O-Level / IGCSE

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @app/api" "npm run dev -w @app/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @app/api && npm run build -w @app/web
scripts.test:all: npm run test -w @app/api && npm run test -w @app/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @app/api && npm run typecheck -w @app/web
